intro: Understanding Midjourney pricing is critical for creators and developers planning their AI art generation budget. Whether you're experimenting with the Basic plan ($10/month) or running a commercial agency, this calculator compares all subscription tiers—from Basic to Mega ($120/month)—showing monthly costs, included GPU hours, and key features. Pricing is current as of 2026 and updated regularly.

explanation:
**Midjourney pricing calculator**: Choose the right subscription plan based on your AI image generation needs. Whether you're a casual creator or running a commercial agency, understanding included GPU hours and features helps you budget effectively.

## How it works

Select your desired Midjourney plan to see the monthly cost, included fast GPU hours, and available features. This calculator shows real 2026 pricing for all subscription tiers.

## Plans at a glance

- **Basic**: $10/month, 200 monthly images, no fast GPU
- **Standard**: $30/month, 15 fast GPU hours, unlimited relax mode
- **Pro**: $60/month, 30 fast GPU hours, stealth mode, commercial rights
- **Mega**: $120/month, 60 fast GPU hours, built for agencies and teams

## Important notes

This calculator is a reference guide. Midjourney pricing and features are subject to change—always verify current rates on the official Midjourney website. This calculator is completely free and requires no registration.

faq.a: $10/month. Covers 200 images monthly. No access to fast mode GPU hours.

faq.q: How much does Midjourney Standard cost?
faq.a: $30/month. Includes 15 fast GPU hours and unlimited relax-mode generations.

faq.q: What's the difference between Midjourney Pro and Standard?
faq.a: Pro costs $60/month with 30 fast GPU hours, stealth mode (private images), and commercial license rights.

faq.q: When should I upgrade to Midjourney Mega?
faq.a: $120/month with 60 fast GPU hours. Best for agencies, teams, and high-volume commercial projects.

faq.q: Does Midjourney include commercial license rights?
faq.a: Only Pro and Mega plans include commercial use rights. Basic and Standard are for personal use only.

faq.q: What are free alternatives to Midjourney?
faq.a: Stable Diffusion (free, local install), DALL-E 3 (via ChatGPT Plus), Runway, and Leonardo.AI. Each has different pricing and features.

faq.q: Can I use Midjourney via API?
faq.a: No official Midjourney API. For programmatic access, use Stable Diffusion through Replicate or Runway instead.
Yes, all Hacé Cuentas calculators are completely free with no account or registration required.
